citation: 12 CFR §1026.22(a)(2) - regular transaction exactly at +/- 1/8 pp boundary (`<=` semantics)
comment: Hand-calc: Decimal('0.0700') - Decimal('0.07125') = Decimal('-0.00125'); abs(-0.00125) = Decimal('0.00125') EXACTLY (Decimal arithmetic is exact, no float drift). TOLERANCE_REGULAR = 0.00125. 0.00125 <= 0.00125 -> True (regulation uses `does not exceed` = `<=`). Pins Pitfall 11 + the at-boundary semantics.
